title: Cross-Standard Control Mapping
description: Schema for mapping related controls across ISO 27001, NIST CSF 2.0, Cyber Essentials, and GDPR.

mapping_id.description: Unique identifier for this mapping group (e.g., MAP-AC-01).

control_domain.description: The governance domain this mapping covers.

unified_objective.description: A synthesised control objective that captures the shared intent across the mapped requirements.

requirement_id.description: Requirement ID from the source standard.

relationship.description: How this requirement relates to the unified objective.

mapped_requirements.description: The set of requirements from different standards that map to this unified objective.

notes.description: Optional commentary on the mapping rationale.
